title: You only need this to pass prop firms (ICT MACROS)
author: macr0trader
selftext:
This made me start making money in prop firms, i have more than 30k in payouts just by using this.

ICT Macros are the most powerful thing you can use, its based on **TIME**

ICT always say \*\*"TIME AND PRICE"\*\*and this is the truth.

Macros are a time window of 20minutes, every hour is a macro, from xx:50 to xx:10

***Example***:

01:50 to 02:10

04:50 to 05:10

09:50 to 10:10

20:50 to 21:10

Etc...

**What is a macro?**

\-A macro is a function in the alghoritm. When the macro starts, price will do a expansion or a reversal.

\-Its our job to figure out what the macro will do.

**What time is the macro?**

\-Every hour is a macro.

\-A macro is a time window beetween xx:50 to xx:10

***Example:***

01:50 to 02:10

04:50 to 05:10

09:50 to 10:10

20:50 to 21:10

Etc...

**Why the macro is important?**

\-ICT told us "Price and Time", this is the secret most people dont understand!

\-When time is not correct, price will not move!

\-You dont need to watch the chart for 5...6 hours a day. you just need to show up at the right moment!

\-BEFORE ANY EXPANSION MOVE, the macro will be in place, EVERY!

**Remember:**

TIME AND PRICE

comments.author: A_Traders_Edge
comments.body: I’m not saying there’s no validity to some of his ideas but the dude is a scam artist that thinks he’s a god. All you have to do is look at his record for any live trading he’s EVER done. And if you find proof of profitability then he’s doctored the photos. Look up iman trading on YouTube….and look bud, it’s ok to be defensive about it as it since you seem like your all about him but watch some of imantrading videos about him and then watch ict (I Can’t Trade) videos. Deep in your heart you most likely felt this. Like, it’s hard to find a lot of logical points to his claims many times and  he contradicts himself ALL the time bc it’s just about what supports his claims at that moment for that “ict concept” he’s pushing. Btw I’m not saying everything he says is invalid….again….just watch a few videos on imantrading. He backs up what he says with evidence(deals with psychology when tearing down these furus…fake gurus), he’s so friggin absolutely hilarious, and most importantly, he FIRST provides the evidence to the individual he’s ripping a new one and gives them an opportunity to answer for themselves in an intelligible way (btw…they NEVER do bc they’re all genuinely hacks that can’t trade….but ict is a whole diff animal altogether that thinks he’s a god). He’s even exposed someone that he’s previously promoted and who he had much respect for. Aaanyways…sorry for the bad structuring of sentences and good luck to you with all your endeavors.

comments.author: Comfortable_Ask_4631
comments.body: This is the dumbest thing I've seen all day, and I've been doomscrolling on social media.
